scripts.build: tsc -b && vite build && node -e "var f=require('fs');var h=f.readFileSync('dist/index.html','utf8');var m=h.match(/(<script[^>]*>[\s\S]*<\/script>)/);if(m){var s=m[1];h=h.replace(s,'');h=h.replace('</body>',s+'</body>');}h=h.replace('type=\"module\" crossorigin','');f.writeFileSync('dist/index.html',h);console.log('Post-processed: script moved to end of body')"
